name: Coupon: Create

description.en: Create a discount coupon as an SFT in your collection. Customers can claim and hold the coupon in their wallet, then redeem it at checkout. All details are stored on-chain.
description.de: Erstelle einen Rabattgutschein als SFT in deiner Kollektion. Kunden können den Gutschein in ihrer Wallet halten und beim Bezahlen einlösen. Alle Details sind on-chain gespeichert.
description.fr: Créez un coupon de réduction en tant que SFT dans votre collection. Les clients peuvent le conserver dans leur wallet et l'utiliser au paiement. Tout est stocké on-chain.
description.es: Crea un cupón de descuento como SFT en tu colección. Los clientes pueden reclamarlo y mantenerlo en su wallet, luego canjearlo al pagar. Todo está almacenado on-chain.
description.ro: Creează un cupon de reducere ca SFT în colecția ta. Clienții pot revendica și păstra cuponul în wallet, apoi folosi la plată. Totul este stocat on-chain.

bot: Creates an on-chain coupon as an SFT. Needs a collection ID (create one first if needed). Ask for the coupon code, discount percentage, max uses (0 = unlimited), and validity period in days (0 = never expires).

inputs.name: Collection ID

description.en: The SFT collection to create the coupon in.
description.de: Die SFT-Kollektion, in der der Gutschein erstellt wird.
description.fr: La collection SFT dans laquelle créer le coupon.
description.es: La colección SFT en la que crear el cupón.
description.ro: Colecția SFT în care se creează cuponul.

inputs.bot: The on-chain collection ID. Create a collection first if you don't have one.

inputs.name: Code

description.en: Short, memorable code customers will enter (e.g. SUMMER20, VIP50)
description.de: Kurzer einprägsamer Code, den Kunden eingeben (z. B. SOMMER20, VIP50)
description.fr: Code court et mémorable que les clients saisiront (ex. SUMMER20, VIP50)
description.es: Código corto y memorable que introducirán los clientes (p. ej. SUMMER20, VIP50)
description.ro: Cod scurt și memorabil pe care îl vor introduce clienții (ex. SUMMER20, VIP50)

inputs.bot: Short memorable coupon code — e.g. LAUNCH10, VIP50, WELCOME. Max 32 characters, uppercase recommended.

inputs.name: Discount

description.fr: Pourcentage de réduction appliqué à l'utilisation
description.es: Porcentaje de descuento aplicado al canjear
description.ro: Procentul de reducere aplicat la folosire

inputs.bot: Discount percentage — e.g. 10 for 10% off. Must be between 1 and 100.

inputs.name: Max Uses

description.en: Maximum number of times this coupon can be redeemed (0 = unlimited)

inputs.bot: Max redemptions. 0 for unlimited. Common values: 0 for unlimited, 100 for a campaign.

inputs.name: Valid For

description.en: How long this coupon is valid from now (0 = never expires)
description.de: Wie lange der Gutschein ab jetzt gültig ist (0 = läuft nie ab)
description.fr: Durée de validité à partir de maintenant (0 = n'expire jamais)
description.es: Cuánto tiempo es válido el cupón desde ahora (0 = no caduca nunca)
description.ro: Cât timp este valabil cuponul de acum (0 = nu expiră niciodată)

inputs.bot: Validity period in days from now. 0 for no expiry. Examples: 7 for a week, 30 for a month.

success.en: Coupon {{code}} created! Customers can claim it — {{maxUses}} redemptions available.
success.de: Gutschein {{code}} erstellt! Kunden können ihn jetzt beanspruchen — {{maxUses}} Einlösungen verfügbar.
success.fr: Coupon {{code}} créé ! Les clients peuvent le réclamer — {{maxUses}} utilisations disponibles.
success.es: ¡Cupón {{code}} creado! Los clientes pueden reclamarlo — {{maxUses}} canjes disponibles.
success.ro: Cuponul {{code}} a fost creat! Clienții îl pot revendica — {{maxUses}} utilizări disponibile.
